headlines.description: — Nico Hoerner had four hits to tie a career high, Matthew Boyd gave up three hits and one run in six sharp innings to win his fourth straight start, and the Chicago Cubs beat the Minnesota Twins 6-2 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: The Cubs beat the Twins 6-2 as Nico Hoerner ties a career high with 4 hits

events.name: New York Mets at Philadelphia Phillies

headlines.description: — Kyle Schwarber hit his major league-leading 33rd home run, fellow All-Star Jesús Luzardo allowed two hits in five strong innings and the Philadelphia Phillies defeated the New York Mets 6-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Schwarber, Turner and Luzardo lead the Phillies to a 6-1 victory over the Mets

headlines.description: — Shane Bieber and three relievers combined on a four-hitter, Vladimir Guerrero Jr. reached base three times and the Toronto Blue Jays beat the White Sox 1-0 on Saturday to snap Chicago’s four-game winning streak.

headlines.description: — Nolan Arenado had a two-run double as he closes on 2,000 career hits, Brandon Pfaadt had another good day on the mound since returning from the minors and the Arizona Diamondbacks beat the St. Louis Cardinals 5-3 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nolan Arenado closes in on 2,000 career hits, Diamondbacks top the Cardinals 5-3
